column5:
A list of every film in 2021 I'm excited to see or plan on seeing. Not every film I'm looking forward to has a slated release, so it's incomplete for the time being. Sorted by release date (check notes to see order)
Also I'm not going to remove films as I see them, as I want to look back on this in the future and go, "Yeah... 2021 was a good year for film."
